title: Practical business writing
description: Block 6 opener — real business memo at high speed
text: To: All staff. From: Operations. Subject: New office hours. Effective June 1, the headquarters will open at 8:00 a.m. and close at 7:00 p.m., Monday through Friday. Remote work remains flexible. Please update your calendars accordingly. Questions? Reply to ops@company.com.

tips.text: Block 6 = real-world application. Every lesson = work scenario.
Memo format has its own rhythm — headers, body, signoff

tips.target: To: All staff. From: Operations. Subject: New office hours. Effective June 1, the headquarters will open at 8:00 a.m. and

tips.text: Email addresses should be one continuous motion by now

tips.target: close at 7:00 p.m., Monday through Friday. Remote work remains flexible. Please update your calendars accordingly. Questions? Reply to ops@company.com.

character_tips.anna: Block 6! Every lesson here you'll use in your real career.
character_tips.maxim: Memos, emails, reports — this is the bread and butter of work.
character_tips.knopych: REAL WORLD MODE! 💼 Office quest activated!
character_tips.klavochka: The writing of grown-up work, my dear — practice with care 📋
